Invite a friend —
get more time
referral.description: Just share your code. Your friend gets +10 days on their first subscription, and you get up to 30 days as a bonus.

items.a: Different protocols offer different balances of speed, security, and stability. For example, modern solutions like WireGuard offer high speed and simple architecture, while classic protocols like OpenVPN are known for their reliability and wide support.

items.q: In which countries are your servers available?
items.a: We have servers in many countries around the world. The full list of available locations is available in the app after connecting.

items.q: Do you store user activity logs?
items.a: No, we do not store user activity logs. We adhere to a strict no-logs policy to protect your privacy.

items.q: How secure is a VPN connection?
items.a: Our VPN uses modern encryption to protect your data. All traffic is encrypted before leaving your device, ensuring high security on any network.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept major bank cards, as well as popular payment systems. For a full list of available methods, see the payment page in the app.

about.keyPointsBody: Qat Bilişim LTD. develops and operates Raqoon digital services. We prioritize process transparency, personal data protection, and high service quality. The company operates in accordance with applicable legal requirements and internal security standards.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body:
Raqoon Privacy Policy
Effective Date: March 1, 2026
Jurisdiction: Ankara, Türkiye
Owner: Qat Bilişim Ltd.

Summary
We respect your right to anonymity and security. We do not see what you do online, we do not log the websites you visit, and we do not store the content of your traffic. Our system only records technical parameters (data volume and the time of your last connection) to ensure connection quality. We do not store your card details — all payments are processed through secure external gateways.

1. Zero Logs Policy
We adhere to a strict no-logs policy regarding your activity. The technical architecture of the Service prevents us from recording, storing, or sharing the following data with third parties:
• Activity History: We do not record visited websites (URLs), search queries, or browsing history.
• Network Queries: We do not keep logs of DNS queries.
• Traffic Content: We do not have access to the content of transmitted data, including messages, emails, or files.
• Original IP Address: We do not store your real IP address while you use the service, nor do we link it to your activity.

2. Data We Collect (Technical Necessity)
To ensure stable operation and manage subscriptions, the Service processes a minimal set of technical data.
2.1. Identification
• UUID / Access Key: A unique technical identifier used to authorize your device on our servers.
• Email (Optional): Used exclusively for account recovery or sending receipts and system notifications.
2.2. Statistics and Diagnostics
• Data Volume: The amount of sent and received data used to monitor your plan's limits.
• Last Connection Time: Recorded to identify connection issues and maintain an accurate session status.
• Subscription Status: The validity period and activity status of your access key.

3. App Functionality and No-Tracking
• Marketing Trackers: Our applications do not contain third-party marketing or analytics tools (such as Facebook SDK or advertising IDs) that could transmit your data to third parties.
• Availability Monitoring: The application may automatically check the connection to our nodes. This data is completely anonymized and used solely to automatically select the fastest server.

4. Payment Information
We do not store or process your full bank card details.
• App Store: Transactions are processed by the Apple App Store. We receive only an encrypted token confirming the fact of payment.
• Other Methods: For payments via external gateways or cryptocurrency, we only see the transaction status and ID to activate the service.

5. Data Retention and Deletion
• Technical Information: Data regarding traffic and login times is stored for the duration of your subscription.
• Automatic Deletion: If you do not renew your subscription, account data may be completely removed from the system after 90 days of inactivity.
• Your Right to Delete: You can completely delete your account and all associated information at any time through the app settings or by contacting support.

6. Data Sharing and Legal Requests
Qat Bilişim Ltd. is registered in Türkiye. We do not sell user data or transfer it to advertising companies. In the event of official requests from law enforcement agencies, we operate strictly within the law. However, our architecture makes it impossible to provide data about your actions online, as this information is technically not recorded. We can only confirm the existence of an account and the total volume of traffic consumed.

7. Contact Us
For questions regarding privacy or data deletion:
• Email: private@raqoon.app
• Telegram: @raqoonbot
• Location: Ankara, Türkiye

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.body: By using Raqoon services, you agree to the platform terms. We provide services as is and reserve the right to update features, pricing, and usage rules. Continued use after updates means acceptance of the current version of these terms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any questions regarding service operation, access, billing, or support, contact us at hello@raqoon.app. We aim to respond as quickly as possible.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.body: Refund requests are reviewed individually according to payment terms and applicable law. To request a refund, contact support at hello@raqoon.app and include payment details and the reason for your request.
